title: Power supply unit
abstract: A power supply unit includes a set of primary circuits operably coupled to a set of phase pair electrical inputs. The electrical inputs provide an input voltage via alternating current. Each primary circuit receives a phased pair electrical input of the set of phase pair electrical inputs and provides a tap output. A single transformer is operably coupled to each tap output. A single secondary circuit is operably coupled to the transformer to provide an output voltage via a direct current.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A power supply unit, comprising: a plurality of primary circuits operably coupled to a plurality of phase pair electrical inputs providing an input voltage via alternating current, each primary circuit to receive a phase pair electrical input of the plurality of phase pair electrical inputs and provide a tap output; a single transformer operably coupled to each tap output; and a single secondary circuit operably coupled to the transformer to provide an output voltage via a direct current. 2. The power supply unit of claim 1 wherein each primary circuit includes a non isolated power factor conversion circuit. 3. The power supply unit of claim 2 wherein each primary circuit includes a bulk energy storage circuit. 4. The power supply unit of claim 1 comprising a switching circuit including a power width modulator operably coupled to each of the plurality of primary circuits. 5. The power supply unit of claim 1 wherein the plurality of primary circuits is three primary circuits. 6. A power supply, comprising: a first input circuit having a first non-isolated power factor correction circuit and a first bulk energy storage circuit, the first input circuit operably coupled to a first phase pair electrical input of a plurality of phase pair electrical inputs, the first phase pair electrical input to provide an input voltage via alternating current; a second input circuit having a second non-isolated power factor correction circuit and a second bulk energy storage circuit, the second input circuit operably coupled to a second phase pair electrical input of a plurality of phase pair electrical inputs, the second phase pair electrical input to provide an input voltage via alternating current; a third input circuit having a third non-isolated power factor correction circuit and a third bulk energy storage circuit, the third input circuit operably coupled to a third phase pair electrical input of a plurality of phase pair electrical inputs, the third phase pair electrical input to provide an input voltage via alternating current; a single transformer operably coupled to the first input circuit, the second input circuit, and the third input circuit; and a single secondary circuit operably coupled to the transformer to provide an output voltage via direct current, the secondary circuit including a switching circuit operably 

 coupled to the first input circuit, the second input circuit, and the third input circuit. 7. The power supply of claim 6 wherein the input voltage is provided via a electrical signal having three phases, and each phase of the three phases includes two components, wherein the first phase pair includes a component from a first phase and a second phase, the second phase pair includes a component from the second phase and a third phase, and the third phase pair includes a component from the first phase and the third phase. 8 A system, comprising: a computing device including a processor and a memory, the computing device coupled to a voltage via direct current; and a power supply operably coupled to the computing device, the power supply comprising: an plurality of primary circuits operably coupled to a plurality of phase pair electrical inputs providing an input voltage via alternating current, each primary circuit receiving a phased pair electrical input of the plurality of phase pair electrical inputs and providing a tap output; a single transformer operably coupled to each tap output; and a single secondary circuit operably coupled to the transformer to provide an output voltage via a direct current to the computing device. 9. The system of claim 8 comprising: a power distribution unit operably coupled to the power supply unit, the power distribution unit to provide the plurality of phase pair electrical inputs providing an input voltage via alternating current to the plurality of primary circuits. 10. The system of claim 8 wherein the computing device includes a server.
